arts.ttl: Cameron Carter-Vickers OUT of Celtic's clash with Atalanta as defender fails to travel for Champions League showdown
arts.sum: The defender has been sidelined for over a month with Auston Trusty filling the void

arts.ttl: Ross McCormack's view on Aberdeen challenging Celtic is not good news for Rangers
arts.sum: There is a view, however, that Aberdeen have it in them to at least finish second and when asked if they could win the league, former Rangers midfielder Ross McCormack delivered a verdict that is not good news for the Ibrox club. “So it makes no difference to them now whether they’re going to be playing Celtic or Rangers or anyone else, they now believe that they can go win the game.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton responds to 'really interesting question' about Celtic and Aberdeen title race
arts.sum: Smith asked: “Chris, can you see enough of the other teams taking points off Celtic for Aberdeen to have a pathway to the title?” As of this moment, and it’s still early doors, they are in a title race, but knowing this Celtic team, they can blow anyone out of the water in next to no time.

In the evening match on Saturday, Juventus secured three points against Lazio thanks to an own goal by Gila in the dying moments of the game, marking their return to victory at the Stadium two months after their last win. The visitors secured their third consecutive draw in the league and their sixth in eight matches, matching the club`s record set in the 1989/90 season.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Atalanta v Celtic: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Champions League group stage reaches its midway point, Atalanta and Celtic prepare to face off in a crucial matchup at the Gewiss Stadium on Wednesday. Both teams enter the contest with contrasting fortunes in their European campaigns so far, setting the stage for an intriguing battle in Bergamo. Gian Piero Gasperini’s Atalanta side has made a strong start to their Champions League campaign, collecting four points from their opening two matches. A resilient goalless draw against Arsenal on matchday one was followed by an impressive 3-0 victory over Shakhtar Donetsk, propelling the Italian outfit to the top of The post Champions League | Atalanta v Celtic: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: I starred under Gasperini and he plays sexy football but Atalanta aren't invincible and Celtic must have no fear
arts.sum: Massimo Donati - who played for both clubs during his playing career - has given his views ahead of the big clash in Bergamo

arts.ttl: Latest Atalanta team news for Celtic clash in Champions League
arts.sum: Atalanta defender Sead Kolasinac was not seen on the pitch on Tuesday, so he’s unlikely...

arts.ttl: Celtic publish training footage before big Atalanta game and one thing will have fans buzzing
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers admitted just before the Aberdeen game that although Cameron Carter-Vickers was back in training, the Celtic boss will have to wait and see how he reacted before deciding on whether or not he will make the Atalanta game. Cameron Carter-Vickers trained with Celtic before Atalanta game

arts.ttl: Ally McCoist in agony as he hears Celtic icon nail Rangers on every one of the flaws that has diehards on the brink
arts.sum: The Ibrox icon is on the same page as Martin O'Neill after the former Parkhead boss revealed his disma

arts.ttl: Michael Stewart thinks Celtic attacker could fix Brendan Rodgers' defensive issues v Atalanta
arts.sum: Kyogo Furuhashi has been leading the line for Celtic, but Stewart feels starting Idah against Atalanta would provide ‘balance’ to the team and that would, as a result, help fix their defensive issues, as he told The Scottish Football Podcast. Michael Stewart thinks Adam Idah could fix Celtic’s defensive issues in Champions League
